### Selected Projects

<table>
<tr><td>

#### [Muster](https://github.com/scott2b/muster)

Terminal session group management built on tmux. Organize terminal sessions into named, color-coded groups with saved profiles and push-based state sync via tmux control mode.

![Rust](https://img.shields.io/badge/Rust-000?logo=rust&logoColor=white)
[![crates.io](https://img.shields.io/crates/v/muster-cli)](https://crates.io/crates/muster-cli)
[![docs](https://img.shields.io/badge/docs-mdbook-blue)](https://scott2b.github.io/muster/)

```
cargo install muster-cli
```

</td></tr>
<tr><td>

#### [Reifire](https://github.com/scott2b/reifire)

A Python library for reifying natural language prompts into structured, interactive data objects. Inspired by the concept of "AI-instruments" from Microsoft's New Future of Work Report 2024 — turning abstract prompts into persistent, reusable interface objects that users can store, combine, and manipulate.

![Python](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3776AB?logo=python&logoColor=white)
![Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/status-alpha-orange)

</td></tr>
</table>
